name: @akakaui/shipkit
description: Code Development OS — agents, skills, and pipeline for production-ready code

shipkit-code.description: Master orchestrator — routes requests to sub-agents, runs quality gates

shipkit-planner.description: Gathers requirements, classifies scope, defines features (Phase 1)

shipkit-architect.description: Selects stack, designs architecture, plans data model (Phase 2)

shipkit-frontend.description: Builds UI components, state management, user interfaces

shipkit-backend.description: Builds APIs, databases, authentication, server-side logic

shipkit-extension.description: Builds Chrome extensions with Manifest V3

shipkit-tester.description: Writes unit, integration, E2E, and security tests (Phase 4)

shipkit-reviewer.description: Reviews code quality, security, handoff readiness

shipkit-auto-detect.description: Classifies project type and loads appropriate skills

shipkit-github-tracker.description: Watches PRs, issues, releases, CI status

shipkit-ops-monitor.description: Watches logs, metrics, uptime, alerts, cost

infra-networking.description: CDN, DNS, WAF, load balancers, SSL, DDoS protection

db-scale.description: Connection pooling, read replicas, sharding, migrations

resilience-patterns.description: Rate limiting, circuit breakers, retries, graceful degradation

security-hardening.description: OWASP Top 10, auth, encryption, SBOM, compliance
